S.FORM: == siliq == kpaysuy ru siliq ga, blaq nha' mggluw mhtuw te lhlahuy. .
S.PHON: == s~ɕiliq == kpajs~ɕuj ru s~ɕiliq ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mɣɣluw mħtuw te lħlaħuj. .
S.FORM: == siliq == kpaysuy ru siliq ga, blaq nha' mggluw mhtuw te lhlahuy. .
S.PHON: == s~ɕiliq == kpajs~ɕuj ru s~ɕiliq ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mɣɣluw mħtuw te lħlaħuj. .
